name: Deluxe Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped nuts or chocolate chips
1 cup Marshmallow fluff or miniature marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
Topping:
1 1/3 cups Chocolate chips
3 tablespoons Butter or margarine
1 cup Peanut butter
2 cups Crisp rice cereal (chocolate or plain)
Oven: 350°F (or 175°C)
1. Grease or spray a jelly-roll pan.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition, then stir in vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in chopped nuts or chocolate chips.
6. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 15 to 18 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven; sprinkle marshmallow fluff or miniature marshmallows evenly over the top of the bars.
9. Return to oven and bake an additional 2 to 3 minutes, or until marshmallows are lightly toasted.
10. Cool completely before cutting into bars.
Topping:
1. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate chips, butter, and peanut butter over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Remove from heat; stir in the crisp rice cereal.
3. Spread topping evenly over the warm marshmallow bars.
4. Allow to cool completely before serving.
